subject: docs(claude): nuclear-level AskUserQuestion prohibition
body:
Added absolute rule at the very top of CLAUDE.md — before all other
instructions — banning the AskUserQuestion tool permanently. Also
added to Prohibitions section. The tool breaks session UI by covering
context with an input modal that gets stuck. Use numbered text lists
for user input instead.

Tags: docs, ai-notes, ux
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 5
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: ai-workflow
Semver: patch

title: nuclear-level AskUserQuestion prohibition
